# CS Venues

> CS Venues is a single-page reference table for computer science conference venues, CORE rankings, submission deadlines, favorite venues, and local-time countdowns.

The canonical page is `https://cs-venues.hooniverse.net/`. URL query parameters such as `q`, `area`, `core`, `sort`, `dir`, and `theme` represent filtered or personalized views of the same application state and should be treated as alternate views of the canonical page.

The application uses the CCFDDL conference deadline dataset and CORE conference rankings. Deadline times are displayed in the browser's local timezone.

## Primary Resources

- [CS Venues](https://cs-venues.hooniverse.net/): Canonical interactive reference table for CS conference venues, ranks, deadlines, favorites, and local-time countdowns.
- [Conference data JSON](https://cs-venues.hooniverse.net/data/conferences.json): Machine-readable venue, ranking, deadline, location, and acceptance-rate data used by the application.
- [XML sitemap](https://cs-venues.hooniverse.net/sitemap.xml): Canonical URL submitted for search indexing.
- [robots.txt](https://cs-venues.hooniverse.net/robots.txt): Crawl policy for search engines and other automated clients.

## Source Data

- [CCFDDL dataset](https://github.com/ccfddl/ccf-deadlines): Upstream conference deadline data.
- [CORE conference ranks](https://portal.core.edu.au/conf-ranks/): Upstream CORE conference ranking source.

## Optional

- [Project repository](https://github.com/changhoon-sung/cs-venues): Source code for the CS Venues web application.
- [Author profile](https://github.com/changhoon-sung): Maintainer profile.
